textByHash.061c2774a0d1e97dac98a0ce89b074185aabcdf9: You have to help me! I've put the wrong coffins into these graves.
textByHash.107d230b1da699e3f72a1bf0af7bbe391e125acc: I need you to pick up the coffin from each grave, see who's inside it, and bury it in the grave with the correct gravestone.
textByHash.11d474c7bdebd1827f4859a2c192dfe7d93eb87c: I think I see my friends!!
textByHash.26094c590892467ddd3dd21aef25aff0cd8a241f: Where did you think you would go?
textByHash.2d129c1e05d413c73178d2e476de341e8d15639f: I could do this all day!
textByHash.2db6fd276cd5aa38ca021a5536e85994cc9789ca: Silly me! I had it in my pocket all along!
textByHash.2e1e29ff7c33d566153e76592242205769c31a61: I'm blending in. Scopin' out the place.
textByHash.335cece67e5636129c2740e66b227ea248e4f50c: You died, and now you are in a graveyard.
textByHash.3ef80f2c5c591ffabb35f1ae1578a8fd9c390ce3: Now leave me be. I'm already distracting!
textByHash.48d33be52cc24f0e5cfbf4a770160d5a73302ca9: Oh you really brightened my day!
textByHash.5e1ea8278ee9b105d66d0277ef3fe468a87bbe8b: In that case, I'll take you back to where I found you.
textByHash.a42bb3a0002c34c96b5edb9cd40534290f149a05: Wonderful! That's taken care of them. I'll take you back, and give you your reward.
textByHash.a8104b0168d1317fdc3eb9a0fdc258b2fc0fd768: That's a good attempt, but it's just not right. Try looking in the coffins to learn who is in them, and read the gravestones to see who is supposed to be buried there.
textByHash.d61b896e281cf78576918f330dc56704eaa6e3a4: My parents are gonna be so mad!
textByHash.d7dede5b15165c5a917d62690dc934642c25755a: I'm quite sneaky. Every now and then I'll get their attention so their pockets aren't being so carefully watched.
textByHash.d9d97f2da6d67fb0a38cb3a75234e360ce32a71a: Can you come and help me? I've got a problem with some graves.
textByHash.e0dd37205122e0ddd6fc2f4b77732cb336bf5b89: Can I borrow you for a minute?
textByHash.e218098a76bddfb126be977277a6022da80a1d26: Let's just say there are some wealthy people about, with full pockets.
textByHash.f94e435e26757ebf972da89cfa84d92caf274983: No one can dance like me!
